reconciliation_recovery_summary.title: Ledger & Reconciliation
reconciliation_recovery_summary.post_rerun_operator_queue_next_action: Review candidate rollups only; do not write current evidence, latest pointers, live readiness, or scale-up artifacts from this queue.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.post_rerun_reconciliation_repair_path_ne: Record a separately validated operator resolution acceptance before any current-evidence rebuild.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.post_repair_operator_next_action: Keep the repaired ledger rollup as a candidate only. Resolve hash mismatch or run an explicit operator reconciliation before any current-evidence update.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.repair_operator_queue_next_action: Review the single ledger-candidate-ready item first; all other blocked replacements require PAPER cycle rerun or recovery guard evidence before ledger repair.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.stale_loop_post_regeneration_operator_ne: Reconcile BLOCKED regenerated replacements and quarantine mismatched or unpaired artifacts before evidence use.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.stale_loop_operator_queue_closure_next_a: Recheck ledger-only stale-loop replacements with the current PASS ledger/idempotency evidence; keep recovery-blocked replacements out of current evidence.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.stale_loop_isolated_event_id_scope_repai: Keep repaired candidates review-only. Current evidence writes require a separate audited writer and remain blocked here.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.upbit_paper_repaired_current_evidence_au: Keep current evidence writes blocked; implement a separate audited writer with locks, idempotency, and post-write reconciliation before portfolio truth can be considered.
Review the dry-run manifest only; a separate audited writer patch is still required before any current-evidence or portfolio truth artifact can be written.
Keep locked outputs review-only; a separate audited writer implementation is still required before current-evidence or portfolio truth writes.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.one_line_blocker: AUDITED_CURRENT_EVIDENCE_WRITER_NOT_IMPLEMENTED: audited current-evidence writer locked output is review-only; configured PAPER capital=1,000,000 KRW, locked controls=11/12, current-evidence writes=0, portfolio truth writes=0, lock writes=0.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.message: Audited writer locked output is active: status=BLOCKED_LOCKED_OUTPUT_WRITER_NOT_ENABLED, validator=PASS, controls=11/12, blocked-controls=1, configured-cash=1000000, cash=UNVERIFIED, lock=paper_runtime/locks/audited_current_evidence_writer.lock, writer-enabled=false, lock-acquired=false, current-evidence artifact=false, portfolio truth artifact=false.
reconciliation_recovery_summary.next_operator_action: Keep locked outputs review-only; a separate audited writer implementation is still required before current-evidence or portfolio truth writes.
